summary: Reviewed `git diff main...HEAD`, `git log --oneline main..HEAD`, and `reviews/camera-overlay.md`. The branch generally implements the requested context routing, sanitized overlay state, capability docs, and viewer-path removal. I could not complete `npm test` because the read-only sandbox prevented Vitest/Vite from writing its temp config file.

findings.title: Mock preview does not hide when overlay is stopped
findings.claim: The simulated camera frame always mounts `OverlayApp` whenever `adapter.isMock` is true. `stopOverlay()` only calls `stopCameraOverlay()` and flips `overlayOn` false, but the mounted `OverlayApp` retains the last message state and continues rendering the cost meter in the mock camera preview after the user clicks “Hide from video”. That breaks the mock visual-review behavior required by AC-7 and makes the control state disagree with the preview.
findings.suggestion: Gate the mock `OverlayApp` render on `overlayOn`, or have `stopOverlay`/`MockZoom.stopCameraOverlay` clear the current overlay state and notify subscribers so the simulated frame becomes empty when hidden.
